title: Tree One Hit (TOH)
description: a high-performance Fabric utility that enables instantaneous tree harvesting by felling entire structures through a single-block interaction.
body:
# 🪓 Tree One Hit (TOH)

**Tree One Hit (TOH)** is a professional-grade Fabric modification engineered to streamline timber harvesting through a single-block interaction. By automating the complete felling of tree structures upon contact with any one of their constituent blocks, TOH delivers a measurable advantage in **survival efficiency, resource accumulation, and large-scale environmental clearing** — eliminating the repetitive overhead of manual deforestation and enabling uninterrupted workflow across complex projects.

![Tree One Hit Auto Grab Filter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oA354OmZ/images/3644eeba78b1548ed25967267ce18bae3de725b5.png)

---

## 🎯 Precision Control

TOH incorporates a dedicated **Sneak-to-Disable** mechanism, allowing operators to instantly suppress the automated felling behavior by holding the sneak key (default: `Shift`) during interaction. This ensures full manual control is preserved in scenarios requiring selective harvesting or precise block manipulation — providing efficiency without sacrificing precision.

---

## ⚡ Core Features

- 🌲 **Instantaneous Tree Felling** — The entire tree structure is processed and dropped upon breaking a single connected log block, dramatically accelerating inventory accumulation and terrain clearing operations.
- 🧪 **Granular Loot Filtering** — Use the **Auto Grab Filter** to selectively determine which resources are automatically gathered. Toggle individual categories such as Logs, Saplings, Apples, or Sticks to maintain a clean and organized inventory.
- ⚙️ **In-Game Configuration** — Access a dedicated settings menu to toggle mod status, customize shortcut keys, and manage advanced environmental interactions.
- 🔒 **Sneak-to-Disable Toggle** — Automated behavior is suspended on demand, granting granular control during builds or partial harvests.
- 🔄 **Frictionless Workflow Integration** — Removes the mechanical repetition of conventional timber gathering, maintaining operational momentum throughout extended survival or terraforming sessions.

---

## 🛠️ Technical Specifications

| Property | Details |
|---|---|
| **Mod Loader** | **Fabric** (Exclusively) |
| **Minecraft Compatibility** | **Full Range Support** — TOH supports **every Minecraft version** compatible with the Fabric Loader (from 1.14.4 up to the latest 26.1.x / Winter Drop releases). |
| **Active Development** | Future version support is a core commitment; the mod is consistently updated to maintain compatibility with the latest Fabric toolchains. |
| **Forge / Other Loaders** | Not supported; no plans for cross-loader porting at this time. |

---

## 📜 License & Redistribution Policy

TOH is distributed under a **Custom License** designed to encourage community adoption while ensuring proper developer recognition. The following terms apply to all forms of redistribution and modification:

- ✅ **Modpack Integration** — Inclusion in any public or private modpack is explicitly permitted.
- 🔧 **Derivative Works** — Forking and modification of the project are authorized under the terms of this license.
- ⚠️ **Mandatory Attribution** — All redistributions, forks, and derivative publications **must** provide clear and prominent credit to the original project and its author (**GBX Team / DevGBX9**) within both the project metadata and any public-facing documentation. Failure to comply constitutes a violation of this license.

---

## 👤 Development & Authorship

TOH is independently developed and maintained by **GBX Team**, authored by **DevGBX9** on GitHub. The project upholds a commitment to long-term compatibility and continued support across evolving Minecraft and Fabric releases.
